info.name: IET Management System Core API
info.description:
Comprehensive API collection for the IET (Institution of Engineers Tanzania) Management System.

Base URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/v1

## Authentication
Most endpoints require JWT Bearer token authentication. Use the Login endpoint to get tokens, then they are automatically set via collection scripts.

## Modules
- Auth (Registration, Login, 2FA, Password Management)
- Users (Profile, CRUD)
- Registration (7-step membership application)
- Events (Listing, Registration, Certificates)
- Payments (Initiation, History, Webhooks)
- Membership (Details, Fees, Receipts)
- Notifications (CRUD, Preferences)
- Admin (Dashboard, Members, Applications, Analytics)
- Guest/Public (Calendar, Guest Registration, Dev Fees)

request.description: Check if the API service is running and healthy.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints for user registration, login, token management, password operations, and two-factor authentication.

request.description: Register a new user account. Sends a verification email with a 6-digit code.
Verify email address using the 6-digit code sent during registration.
Resend email verification code if the previous one expired or was not received.
Login with email and password. Returns access token, refresh token, and user details. Tokens are auto-saved to collection variables.
Refresh the access token using a valid refresh token.
Logout the current user and invalidate their refresh token.
Request a password reset. Sends a reset token to the provided email.
Reset password using the token received via email.
Change the current user's password. Requires authentication.
Enable two-factor authentication. Returns a TOTP secret and QR code URL.
Validate the 2FA TOTP token after login when 2FA is enabled.
Disable two-factor authentication for the current user.
Get environment information (development mode only).

item.name: Users
item.description: User management endpoints for profile operations and CRUD.

request.description: Create a new user directly.
Get all users with pagination. Requires authentication.
Get the current authenticated user's profile.
Update the current authenticated user's profile.
Get a specific user by their ID.
Update a user by their ID.
Soft-delete a user by their ID.
Step 1: Create a new registration application with personal details. Creates user account if not exists.
Step 2: Provide engineering discipline, membership class, and other registration details.
Step 3: Add an education entry to the registration.
Update an existing education entry.
Remove an education entry from the registration.

body.raw:
{
  "companyName": "ABC Engineering Ltd",
  "position": "Civil Engineer",
  "industry": "Construction",
  "startDate": "2016-01-01",
  "endDate": "2023-12-31",
  "description": "Designed and supervised construction of road infrastructure projects"
}

request.description: Step 3: Add a professional experience entry.

body.raw:
{
  "companyName": "XYZ Construction",
  "position": "Senior Civil Engineer",
  "industry": "Infrastructure",
  "startDate": "2020-01-01",
  "description": "Leading bridge construction projects"
}

request.description: Update an existing experience entry.
Remove a professional experience entry.
Step 4: Add proposer and supporter references (must be existing IET members).
Step 5: Verify the applicant's email with a verification code.
Step 7: Submit the declaration and finalize the registration application.
Get full registration details including education, experience, documents, and references.
Get all registrations belonging to the current authenticated user.

item.name: Events
item.description: Event management - browsing, registration, certificates, and feedback.

request.description: List events with filtering and pagination. Public endpoint.
Get detailed information about a specific event. Public endpoint.
Register the current authenticated user for an event.
Get the current user's event registrations.
Cancel an event registration.
Get the CPD certificate for a completed event registration.
Submit feedback for an attended event.

item.name: Payments
item.description: Payment processing, history, and webhook endpoints.

request.description: Initiate a payment via the selected payment gateway (M-Pesa, Airtel, Tigo, Selcom, DPO).
Get the current user's payment history with optional filtering.
Get details of a specific payment.
Check the configuration status of all payment gateways.
M-Pesa payment callback webhook (called by M-Pesa servers).
Selcom payment callback webhook.
DPO (Direct Pay Online) payment callback webhook.

item.name: Membership
item.description: Membership management - details, fee payments, and receipts.

request.description: Get the current user's membership details including status, class, and expiry.
Get membership fee payment history.
Initiate payment for annual membership fee.
Get the payment receipt for a specific year's membership fee.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: Notification management - listing, read status, and preferences.

request.description: Get the current user's notifications with pagination.
Mark a specific notification as read.
Mark all notifications as read.
Delete a specific notification.
Get the current user's notification preferences (email, SMS, push).
Update notification delivery preferences.
Get the count of unread notifications.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Admin-only endpoints for dashboard, member management, application review, and analytics. Requires ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN role.

request.description: Get dashboard statistics including total members, pending applications, revenue, etc.
List all members with pagination, filtering by status, class, and search.
Get detailed information about a specific member.
Update a member's membership status (ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, REVOKED, etc.).
Export all members data as a CSV file.
List membership applications for review with filtering.
Review and approve/reject a membership application.
Get member analytics and statistics.
Check-in a guest or member at an event.

item.name: Guest / Public
item.description: Public endpoints for guest event registration, calendar, development fees, and certificate verification.

request.description: Get the public events calendar.
Get system usage instructions for public users.
Register as a guest for a public event (no account required).
Initiate payment for a guest event registration.
Look up a guest registration by ticket number or email.
Generate and get a name tag for a guest registration.
Get the attendance certificate for a guest.
Create a development fee contribution.
Pay a development fee contribution.
Verify the authenticity of a certificate using its unique code.
